message.content:
Explore the RoyallAzz project at C:\Users\User\RoyallAzz thoroughly. I need to understand what has been implemented and what's missing compared to the implementation plan.

Read ALL existing source files in src/ directory (every .tsx, .ts, .css file) and report:
1. Which files exist and their approximate implementation status (complete, partial, placeholder/stub)
2. What key functionality is implemented in each file
3. Any TODO comments or placeholder content

Also check:
- supabase/migrations/ - are there SQL migration files?
- public/ - are there manifest.json, sw.js, icons?
- .env.example - does it exist?
- .gitignore
- vercel.json content
- src/app/api/ - any API routes?

Be very thorough - read every source file.

content.text: Let me continue reading the implementation plan to see what else should be implemented:

Now I have comprehensive information. Let me create a detailed summary report based on my thorough analysis.

## RoyallAzz Project Implementation Status Report

Based on my thorough exploration of the entire project, here's what has been implemented and what's missing:

---

### **PROJECT STRUCTURE OVERVIEW**

**Technology Stack:**
- Next.js 15 (App Router), React 19, TypeScript 5
- TailwindCSS 4, Supabase (PostgreSQL + Auth)
- Stripe, Lucide Icons, Sonner toast notifications, react-qrcode-logo
- pnpm package manager

---

### **1. FILES IMPLEMENTED & STATUS**

#### **Core Configuration Files** ✅ COMPLETE
- `package.json` - Properly configured with all dependencies
- `tsconfig.json` - Strict mode enabled, path aliases (`@/*`)
- `next.config.ts` - Configured with Supabase image patterns
- `postcss.config.mjs` - TailwindCSS PostCSS config
- `.env.example` - Contains all required env vars
- `.gitignore` - Properly excludes node_modules, .next, .env files
- `vercel.json` - Security headers configured (HSTS, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options)

#### **Design System** ✅ COMPLETE
- `src/app/globals.css` - Full CitedBy.io design system with:
  - Dual theme (light + dark mode)
  - CSS variables for colors, borders, text, glassmorphism
  - Animations (fadeInUp, shimmer, stagger, etc.)
  - Accessibility features (prefers-reduced-motion)
  - Micro-interactions (hover-lift, press-effect, glow)

#### **Root Layout** ✅ COMPLETE
- `src/app/layout.tsx` - Root layout with Geist fonts, ThemeProvider, Toaster
- `src/app/page.tsx` - Home page (redirects to /login)

#### **UI Components** ✅ COMPLETE
- `src/components/ui/Button.tsx` - 4 variants (primary, secondary, ghost, danger), 3 sizes, loading + disabled states
- `src/components/ui/Input.tsx` - With label, error states, accessibility
- `src/components/ui/Card.tsx` - With hover and padding options
- `src/components/ui/Badge.tsx` - 6 variants (default, success, warning, error, blue, accent)
- `src/components/ui/Skeleton.tsx` - 4 variants (text, title, card, circle) with shimmer animation
- `src/components/ui/ThemeToggle.tsx` - Sun/Moon icon toggle

#### **Layout Components** ✅ COMPLETE
- `src/components/layout/Header.tsx` - Logo, theme toggle, plan badge, avatar
- `src/components/layout/Sidebar.tsx` - 3 nav groups (12 items total), active indicator, mobile overlay
- `src/components/layout/PageHeader.tsx` - Title, description, optional action button

#### **Merchant Pages** ⚠️ PARTIAL
- `src/app/(merchant)/layout.tsx` - AppShell (Header + Sidebar + main) ✅
- `src/app/(merchant)/merchant/page.tsx` - Dashboard (static KPI cards, no real data)
- `src/app/(merchant)/merchant/programs/page.tsx` - Program list (empty state)
- `src/app/(merchant)/merchant/programs/new/page.tsx` - Program creation form
- `src/app/(merchant)/merchant/rewards/page.tsx` - Placeholder "Coming soon"
- `src/app/(merchant)/merchant/clients/page.tsx` - Placeholder "Coming soon"
- `src/app/(merchant)/merchant/qr-codes/page.tsx` - QR generator (basic)
- `src/app/(merchant)/merchant/scanner/page.tsx` - Placeholder "Coming soon"
- `src/app/(merchant)/merchant/analytics/page.tsx` - Placeholder "Coming soon"
- `src/app/(merchant)/merchant/campaigns/page.tsx` - Placeholder "Coming soon"
- `src/app/(merchant)/merchant/settings/page.tsx` - Placeholder "Coming soon"
- `src/app/(merchant)/merchant/subscription/page.tsx` - Placeholder "Coming soon"

#### **Merchant Components** ⚠️ PARTIAL
- `src/components/merchant/KpiCards.tsx` - KPI display component (with static data)
- `src/components/merchant/ProgramForm.tsx` - Form to create loyalty programs (functional)
- `src/components/merchant/QrGenerator.tsx` - Basic QR code generator (uses UUID)
- `src/components/merchant/PlanGate.tsx` - Feature lock component for plans

#### **Customer Pages** ⚠️ PARTIAL
- `src/app/(customer)/layout.tsx` - Mobile-first layout with bottom nav
- `src/app/(customer)/customer/page.tsx` - List customer loyalty cards (fetches from DB)
- `src/app/(customer)/customer/settings/page.tsx` - Placeholder "Coming soon"

#### **Customer Components** ✅ COMPLETE
- `src/components/customer/LoyaltyCard.tsx` - Card display with progress bar and tier badge

#### **QR Scan Flow** ✅ COMPLETE
- `src/app/scan/[qr_id]/page.tsx` - Server-side QR validation and auth check
- `src/app/scan/[qr_id]/scan-handler.tsx` - Client-side enrollment logic with welcome bonus

#### **Auth Pages** ✅ COMPLETE
- `src/app/(auth)/login/page.tsx` - Email/password login form (Suspense boundary)
- `src/app/(auth)/register/page.tsx` - Registration with business name

#### **Supabase Integration** ✅ COMPLETE
- `src/lib/supabase/client.ts` - Browser client factory
- `src/lib/supabase/server.ts` - Server client factory with cookie handling
- `src/lib/supabase/types.ts` - Full TypeScript interfaces for all tables

#### **Authentication** ✅ COMPLETE
- `src/middleware.ts` - Route protection (auth check), public paths whitelist

#### **Theme & Utils** ✅ COMPLETE
- `src/lib/theme-context.tsx` - Light/dark theme provider with localStorage persistence
- `src/lib/utils.ts` - `cn()` utility for className merging

#### **Database** ✅ COMPLETE
- `supabase/config.toml` - Supabase local config
- `supabase/migrations/001_complete_schema.sql` - Full schema with:
  - 8 tables (merchants, loyalty_programs, rewards, customers, customer_cards, transactions, merchant_qr_codes, customer_qr_codes)
  - Row-level security (RLS) policies for all tables
  - Proper foreign keys and constraints
  - Indexes for performance
  - Plan enforcement function

#### **PWA Support** ✅ COMPLETE
- `public/manifest.json` - PWA manifest with icon references, start_url, theme color
- `public/sw.js` - Basic service worker (skip-waiting)
- `public/icons/.gitkeep` - Icon directory placeholder

---

### **2. WHAT'S IMPLEMENTED vs. IMPLEMENTATION PLAN**

**Completed:**
- ✅ All UI components (Button, Input, Card, Badge, Skeleton, ThemeToggle)
- ✅ Layout components (Header, Sidebar, PageHeader)
- ✅ Design system with dual theme and animations
- ✅ Supabase clients (server + browser) and types
- ✅ Database migration with complete schema and RLS
- ✅ Auth pages (login, register) with Supabase integration
- ✅ QR scan flow with welcome bonus enrollment
- ✅ Merchant layout (AppShell)
- ✅ Customer pages with card display
- ✅ Service worker and PWA manifest
- ✅ Middleware for route protection
- ✅ Theme persistence with localStorage

**Partially Implemented:**
- ⚠️ **Merchant dashboard** - Only has static KPI card display, needs real data connection
- ⚠️ **Program management** - Form exists but no list display with edit/delete
- ⚠️ **QR generator** - Generates random UUIDs, doesn't save to database
- ⚠️ **Customer settings** - Placeholder only

**Not Implemented (TODO):**
- ❌ **API Routes** - No `/api/*` routes for webhooks, transactions, bulk operations
- ❌ **Stripe Integration** - No payment processing or webhook handling
- ❌ **Analytics** - No analytics data, charts, or dashboard
- ❌ **Merchant Scanner** - No camera-based scanning for transactions
- ❌ **Campaigns** - No marketing campaign management
- ❌ **Rewards Management** - No reward creation/editing UI
- ❌ **Client Management** - No customer search, segmentation, export
- ❌ **Subscription Management** - No plan switching or billing UI
- ❌ **Admin Features** - No super-admin dashboard
- ❌ **Tests** - No unit, integration, or e2e tests
- ❌ **Email Templates** - No transactional emails
- ❌ **Notifications** - No push/email notifications for merchants/customers

---

### **3. KEY FUNCTIONALITY ANALYSIS**

**Working Features:**
1. Light/dark theme switching with persistence
2. User authentication (login/register)
3. Route middleware protection
4. QR code scanning and enrollment with welcome bonus
5. Customer loyalty card display
6. Responsive design (desktop + mobile)
7. Program creation form
8. Basic QR code generation

**Partially Working:**
1. Dashboard KPI cards (static data only)
2. Navigation (complete but many pages are stubs)
3. Database schema (exists but not fully connected to UI)

**Issues/Gaps:**
1. **No real database queries** - Many pages don't fetch actual data
2. **No error handling** - Limited error states in forms
3. **No validations** - Form inputs lack comprehensive validation
4. **No loading states** - Pages don't show loading indicators while fetching
5. **No transaction logging** - Transaction table exists but not used in QR flow
6. **No tier system** - Customer cards show tier but logic not implemented
7. **No file uploads** - Logo, avatar, etc. not handled
8. **No search/filtering** - Client and rewards pages are stubs
9. **Placeholder merchant ID** - ProgramForm uses hardcoded "placeholder" ID
10. **Missing Stripe** - No payment processing at all

---

### **4. TODO COMMENTS & PLACEHOLDERS**

Found in code:
- `src/app/(merchant)/merchant/page.tsx`: `// MVP: static data until Supabase is connected`
- `src/components/merchant/ProgramForm.tsx`: `// MVP: use a placeholder merchant ID; will be replaced with real auth`
- `src/components/merchant/QrGenerator.tsx`: `const id = crypto.randomUUID();` (doesn't save to DB)

---

### **5. FILE SUMMARY TABLE**

| Category | Count | Status |
|----------|-------|--------|
| Pages | 17 | 6 complete, 11 partial/stub |
| Components | 17 | 15 complete, 2 partial |
| Config Files | 5 | All complete |
| Library/Utils | 4 | All complete |
| Database | 2 | Complete |
| Auth/Middleware | 3 | Complete |
| **Total** | **48+** | **~75% structurally complete** |

---

### **6. COMPARISON WITH IMPLEMENTATION PLAN**

The implementation plan includes phases for:
- ✅ Phase 1: Project Scaffolding (100% done)
- ✅ Phase 2: UI Components (100% done)
- ✅ Phase 3: Layout Components (100% done)
- ✅ Phase 4: Supabase + Auth (100% done)
- ⚠️ Phase 5: Merchant Features (30% - stubs only)
- ⚠️ Phase 6: Customer Features (40% - cards work, settings missing)
- ❌ Phase 7: Advanced Features (0% - not started)
- ❌ Phase 8: Stripe & Payments (0% - not started)
- ❌ Phase 9: Testing (0% - no tests)
- ❌ Phase 10: Deployment (0% - config exists but not deployed)

**Overall: ~40% of implementation plan completed**

---

### **ARCHITECTURE NOTES**

✅ **Good:**
- Clean separation of concerns (UI, layout, business logic)
- Proper use of route groups `(auth)`, `(merchant)`, `(customer)`
- Type safety throughout with TypeScript
- Server-side Supabase client for sensitive operations
- RLS policies enforcing data isolation
- Accessible component design

⚠️ **Improvements Needed:**
- Need real data fetching in merchant dashboard
- Missing loading/error boundaries
- No real merchant ID context (currently using placeholder)
- QR codes not persisted to database
- Transaction logging not implemented
